hero.title: Digital 3C Special Effect Lighting
hero.description: Transform your 3C digital products with stunning special effect lighting. Create eye-catching photos and cinematic videos for electronics, gadgets, and tech products using AI-powered dramatic lighting effects that make your products stand out.

steps.title: Upload your 3C product
steps.description: Provide a clear image of your electronic device, gadget, or tech product. The AI analyzes the product's form and surfaces for optimal lighting effects.

steps.title: Apply special effect lighting
steps.description: The workflow applies dramatic lighting effects—neon glows, light trails, reflections, and atmospheric effects that highlight your product's premium features.

steps.title: Generate photos and video
steps.description: Using Nano Banana Pro and Kling 1.6, create stunning still images and dynamic videos with cinematic lighting that captures attention in any feed.

steps.title: Export for marketing
steps.description: Download high-resolution images and videos ready for product launches, social media campaigns, and premium brand marketing materials.

items.question: What is Digital 3C Special Effect Lighting?
items.answer: This AI workflow creates stunning photos and videos of 3C digital products with special effect lighting—neon glows, light trails, dramatic reflections, and atmospheric effects.

items.question: What 3C products work best?
items.answer: Smartphones, tablets, laptops, headphones, smartwatches, gaming peripherals, and any electronics with reflective or sleek surfaces benefit most from special effect lighting.

items.question: Can I create both images and videos?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro for stunning still images and Kling 1.6 for cinematic video content with dynamic lighting effects.

items.question: What types of lighting effects are available?
items.answer: Effects include neon edge lighting, light trails, lens flares, atmospheric glows, reflective highlights, and dramatic shadows that emphasize product design.

items.question: Is this suitable for product launches?
items.answer: Absolutely. The cinematic quality is perfect for product reveals, launch campaigns, and premium marketing materials that create excitement.

items.question: How do credits work for this workflow?
items.answer: Image and video generation consume credits separately based on complexity. Video effects typically require more credits but deliver high-impact marketing content.
